extraction.one_line_summary: FUGLSANG attacked solo on the final climb, held off BETANCUR and ROGLIC on descent, won stage and took yellow by 8 seconds
tactical_patterns: ROGLIC marked BETANCUR's repeated attacks while sitting, conserving energy by staying seated versus out-of-saddle efforts.
BETANCUR attacked multiple times on climb but tempo-controlled seated responses from ROGLIC neutralized each acceleration.
FUGLSANG attacked in yellow jersey opportunistically when rivals were recovering from their own attacks.
Final climb positioning allowed FUGLSANG to go straight through without chasing, exploiting opponents' marking each other.

rider_signals.FUGLSANG Jakob: positive: Won from yellow jersey with bold attack, suggesting confidence to defend rather than conservative riding
rider_signals.ROGLIC Primoz: positive: Controlled BETANCUR's attacks through superior seated power management, limiting energy expenditure
rider_signals.BETANCUR Carlos: negative: Multiple attacks failed to drop ROGLIC, suggesting insufficient power delta despite aggressive intent
rider_signals.PORTE Richie: negative: Lost 35 seconds after following early moves, poor positioning for final climb selection
